business-card-generator.whatItIs: The Business Card Generator creates professional business card designs with customizable templates, layouts, and branding. Design printable business cards online with your logo, contact information, and company details.

howToUse.name: How to Use the Business Card Generator

steps.name: Choose a template
steps.text: Browse business card templates by industry and style. Select a template that matches your brand aesthetic.

steps.name: Enter your details
steps.text: Fill in your name, job title, company, phone, email, website, and address. The tool formats the information professionally.

steps.name: Customize design
steps.text: Change colors, fonts, and layout. Upload your logo and adjust positioning. Preview both front and back of the card.

steps.name: Download business cards
steps.text: Download your business card as a print-ready PDF or high-resolution image. Send to a printer or use for digital sharing.

faqs.question: What file formats can I download?
faqs.answer: Free downloads include PNG and JPG images. Premium plans offer print-ready PDF with bleed marks, SVG vector files, and PSD for Photoshop editing.

faqs.question: What size should a business card be?
faqs.answer: Standard business cards are 3.5 x 2 inches (89 x 51 mm) in the US, and 85 x 55 mm internationally. The tool uses standard dimensions with optional bleed for printing.

faqs.question: Can I design both sides?
faqs.answer: Yes, the tool supports front and back design. Use the back for additional information, QR codes, or a different layout.

faqs.question: Is the Business Card Generator free?
faqs.answer: Basic business card design is free. Premium plans offer print-ready files, vector formats, and unlimited designs.

business-card-generator.seoDescription: Create business cards online for free. Design professional cards with templates, logos, and custom branding. Download print-ready PDFs and high-res images.

certificate-generator.whatItIs: The Certificate Generator creates professional certificates for courses, awards, competitions, and achievements. Design printable certificates with customizable templates, borders, and personalized details.

howToUse.name: How to Use the Certificate Generator

steps.name: Choose a template
steps.text: Select a certificate template for your purpose: course completion, award, participation, or professional certification.

steps.name: Customize content
steps.text: Enter recipient name, course/achievement title, date, and signature lines. Add your organization logo and customize colors.

steps.name: Configure design
steps.text: Adjust fonts, border styles, and layout. Add a QR code for certificate verification if needed.

steps.name: Generate and download
steps.text: Generate the certificate and download as PDF or high-resolution image. Print or share digitally with recipients.

faqs.question: What certificate types can I create?
faqs.answer: The tool supports course completion certificates, award certificates, participation certificates, professional certifications, and custom achievement certificates.

faqs.question: Can I add a verification QR code?
faqs.answer: Yes, premium plans allow adding QR codes that link to an online verification page. This prevents certificate fraud and enables instant verification.

faqs.question: What formats are available?
faqs.answer: Free downloads include PNG images. Premium plans offer print-ready PDF with bleed marks, editable PSD files, and vector formats.

faqs.question: Is the Certificate Generator free?
faqs.answer: Basic certificate generation is free. Premium plans offer batch generation, verification systems, and print-ready files.

certificate-generator.seoDescription: Generate certificates online for free. Create professional certificates for courses, awards, and achievements. Customizable templates with print-ready download.

invoice-generator.whatItIs: The Invoice Generator creates professional invoices for businesses and freelancers. Generate branded invoices with item details, tax calculations, and payment terms. Download as PDF or share online.
features: Line items with quantities and prices

howToUse.name: How to Use the Invoice Generator

steps.name: Enter business details
steps.text: Fill in your business name, address, logo, and contact information. Add your client's details including billing address.

steps.name: Add line items
steps.text: List your products or services with descriptions, quantities, unit prices, and amounts. The tool auto-calculates subtotals and taxes.

steps.name: Set payment terms
steps.text: Enter the invoice number, issue date, due date, and payment terms. Add notes or terms and conditions.

steps.name: Generate and send
steps.text: Click generate to create the invoice PDF. Download it or share via a link for online payment.

faqs.question: Can I add my company logo?
faqs.answer: Yes, upload your company logo to appear at the top of the invoice. The tool supports PNG, JPG, and SVG logos.

faqs.question: Does it calculate taxes automatically?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can set tax rates (percentage or fixed) and the tool auto-calculates tax amounts for each line item and the total.

faqs.question: Can I accept online payments?
faqs.answer: Premium plans integrate with payment gateways like Stripe and PayPal, allowing clients to pay directly from the invoice link.

faqs.question: Is the Invoice Generator free?
faqs.answer: Basic invoice generation is free. Premium plans offer recurring invoices, online payments, and accounting integrations.

invoice-generator.seoDescription: Generate invoices online for free. Create professional business invoices with tax calculations and branding. Download as PDF or share online for payment.
